    1. apply(BaseUnit)

Interface CombatEffect

All Known Implementing Classes:
BurnEffect, DamageEffect, DefenseBuffEffect, DefenseReductionEffect, InstantEffect, LingeringEffect, PushEffect
public interface CombatEffect
Represents a discrete, applyable effect that occurs during or after combat. Classes implementing this interface define specific behaviors (such as applying status conditions, dealing secondary damage, or triggering environmental interactions) that execute against a target unit.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final GameManager
    gm
    * A globally accessible reference to the singleton GameManager, provided for convenience to all implementing combat effects to access grid or state data.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    apply(BaseUnit target)
    Executes the specific logic of this combat effect upon the designated target.

  • Field Details

      static final GameManager gm
      * A globally accessible reference to the singleton GameManager, provided for convenience to all implementing combat effects to access grid or state data.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      void apply(BaseUnit target)
      Executes the specific logic of this combat effect upon the designated target.
      Parameters:
      target - The BaseUnit that will receive the effect.
